resources.string: Demonstrates how to integrate log listeners to save logs to files. When encountering issues, log files can be provided to the technical support team for analysis.

Only 2 steps to integrate:
1. Create FileLogListener instance
2. Call LogHub.addListener() to register listener

Refer to FileLogListener.java to implement file writing logic (marked with TODO)
File log listener registered, logs will be saved to file
This is an INFO level log
This is a WARN level log
This is an ERROR level log
